configs.modelSelectionReason: Falls back to the system default chat/reasoning model. Configurable per deployment.
Prefer a model strong at structured JSON / semantic organization. Configurable; defaults to global default.
configs.productionTarget: Model strong at structured JSON / semantic organization.

configs.modelSelectionReason: A chat model writes the image brief (real image generation is MOCKED in V1). Configurable; defaults to global default.
configs.productionTarget: Chat model that writes the image brief (image gen mocked).

configs.modelSelectionReason: Prefer a model strong at narration / brief writing (HeyGen production is MOCKED in V1). Configurable; defaults to global default.
configs.productionTarget: Model strong at narration / brief writing (HeyGen mocked).

configs.modelSelectionReason: Use the strongest reasoning model available. Configurable; defaults to global default.
Prefer a model strong at safe, bounded learner-facing tone. Configurable; defaults to global default.
configs.productionTarget: Model strong at safe, bounded learner-facing tone.
